description: Modules for creating and managing 3D scenes and objects using a 2D canvas wireframe renderer.

modules.name: geometry-primitives
modules.description: Functions to generate vertex and edge data for basic 3D shapes.

modules.name: scene-manager
modules.description: A 2D canvas-based wireframe renderer for simple 3D scenes.

functions.name: new SceneManager(canvas)
functions.description: Creates a new scene manager instance attached to a canvas.

functions.name: manager.addObject(object)
functions.description: Adds a 3D object to the scene.

functions.name: manager.render()
functions.description: Renders the current state of the scene to the canvas.

modules.name: camera-controller
modules.description: An orbit controller for interacting with a 3D scene camera.

functions.name: createOrbitController
functions.description: Creates an orbit controller and attaches mouse listeners.

functions.name: controller.dispose()
functions.description: Removes event listeners to clean up the controller.
